posts.author: SteelDetailer (Jaimee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

if i click an item, and click the files tab, which lets me see all files from all updates and from all columns, the list view DOES let me scroll, but the grid view DOES NOT let me scroll. would it be an easy fix to just fix the code to allow scrolling in the files tab when in grid view? i wish i could attach a screenshot

What are you trying to achieve

to allow scrolling in the files tab when in grid view
